no: Made in Heaven Spell Pack v7 by Angel. 22 components: spell packs (arcane, divine, IWD, PS:T), class power revisions (paladin, ranger, monk, bard), and spell tweaks. Some components are EXPERIMENTAL/WIP. Install before SCS CONFIRMED CONFLICT with RR (breaks RR cn=5,6,7,8): mih_sp Arcane Spellpack (cn=0) arcane_postproc.tpa uses COPY_EXISTING_REGEXP on all level 6+ SPL files and inserts a global opcode 221 (Remove Secondary / Alacrity dispel) effect into spwi705.spl (Symbol: Fear), growing it from 826 to 874 bytes. This inserts the effect as a global effect (ef_index 0), shifting the ability header's ef_ind from 0 to 1 but leaving ef_num=14 unchanged. RR's ds.tph fix_khelben macro checks SOURCE_SIZE != ef_off + sum(ef_num)*0x30 — ignores global effects, finds 874 != 826, triggers repair. Repair calculates correct effect count (15) but then checks the first ability effect opcode (opcode 139 = Display String, not 233/282), sets fubar=1. Falls back to COPY rr/lib/ds/spwi705.spl (730-byte vanilla). Main detectable_spells loop then reads past end of the 730-byte file ('illegal 2-byte read from offset 730 of 730-byte file spwi705.spl'). Install order in this log WAS correct (mih_sp line 5467764 before RR line 5893492) — the conflict is structural, not ordering. FIX: use Camdawg's or Totor115's RR fork (updated DS library handles global effects in fix_khelben). Do NOT use stock aVENGER RR v4.92 with mih_sp Arcane Spellpack.

conflicts.reason: MiH Spell Pack modifies spells also changed by SR. Install MiH SP after SR; overlapping changes use MiH SP's versions.
conflicts.myComps: #1 Arcane Spellpack #2 Divine Spellpack #13 Spell Improvements #16 Spell Improvements

conflicts.reason: MiH SP cn:1 (IWD Arcane) overlaps with IWDification cn:30. MiH SP cn:2 (IWD Divine) overlaps with IWDification cn:40. Both share CamDawg/DavidW codebase. IWDification cn:30/40/50 No conflict.
conflicts.myComps: #1 Arcane Spellpack #2 Divine Spellpack #7 Revised Bard Powers #16 Spell Improvements
conflicts.theirComps: #30 IWD Arcane #40 IWD Divine #50 Bard Songs (none in Ultimate preset)

conflicts.reason: MiH spell additions overlap with Olvyn Spells; install MiH after Olvyn
conflicts.myComps: #1 Arcane Spellpack #2 Divine Spellpack #13 Spell Improvements

conflicts.reason: NOT a conflict. EET_Tweaks has no temple services or spell learning XP components. EET cn:2042 (XP for Traps/Spells/Lockpicking) is about XP rewards for actions, completely different from MiH SP cn:18 (scribing XP) and cn:19 (temple cure costs).
conflicts.myComps: #14 Expanded Temple Services #8 Revised Spell Learning XP #17 Revised Spell Learning XP

conflicts.reason: Same author (Angel). MiH SP spell components supersede MiH FR spell restorations where they overlap. FR cn:5 (Spell Restorations) and SP cn:0 (Arcane Spellpack) add similar spells. Install FR before SP — SP versions take priority. Non-spell FR components (cn:13 d'Arnise Text, cn:16 Prepared Allies) are independent.
conflicts.myComps: #1 Arcane Spellpack #2 Divine Spellpack #13 #16 Spell Improvements
conflicts.theirComps: #5 Spell Restorations / #13 Restored Bhaalspawn Powers / #16 Revised Spell Damage Caps
conflicts.source: Same author; SP is newer/more comprehensive version of overlapping spell content, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: MiH SP bard components overlap with IWDification bard components. IWDification cn:50/150 No conflict.
conflicts.theirComps: #50 IWD Bard Songs #150 Bard Spell Progression (neither in Ultimate preset)

6d12 electrical to all hostiles in range.

ki.pattern: ERROR Installing \[Fourth level Animate Dead for Wizards\]|Unknown function: struct_read
ki.description: SFO struct_read syntax bug in animate_dead_scrolls.tpa. LAUNCH_PATCH_FUNCTION with spaced 'RET_ARRAY m = struct' causes 'Unknown function: struct_read' on BERNARD3.STO.
ki.workaround: Apply eet-mod-forge-patches, or manually change 'LAUNCH_PATCH_FUNCTION struct_read RET_ARRAY m = struct END' to 'LPF struct_read RET_ARRAY m=struct END' in mih_sp/animate_dead/animate_dead_scrolls.tpa.

ki.description: mih_sp bundles SFO2E whose ALTER_SCRIPT.TPH fails GLR-parsing at line 548 col 1-25 under WeiDU 25201+. Blocks most spell-pack components. Same root cause as iwdification/mih_fr. Distinct from the existing 'animate_dead_scrolls.tpa' ki entry.
ki.workaround: Use WeiDU <= 25200, or wait for mih_sp to ship an updated SFO2E.

sum: Made in Heaven's spell pack: 36 new spells and spell tweaks across arcane and divine schools. Individually selectable additions.

co.no: MiH original arcane spells. Install before SCS IWD spells. INSTALLS WITH WARNINGS (non-fatal): SFO skips WIZARD_MASS_CHARM if already present at wrong level/type (another spell mod owns it); deolvynize UI patches are no-ops if Olvyn Spells not installed. INSTALLED WITH WARNINGS — WIZARD_MASS_CHARM already present at wrong level/type (SR moved it). One spell copy aborted. Also UI edit to mage spellbook had no effect. Non-fatal.

co.n: Fourth level Animate Dead for Wizards
co.tp2n: Fourth level Animate Dead for Wizards
co.no: Allows wizards to cast Animate Dead at 4th spell level. INSTALL FIX APPLIED: animate_dead_scrolls.tpa line 6 — LAUNCH_PATCH_FUNCTION replaced with LPF. The full form with spaced 'RET_ARRAY m = struct' causes 'Unknown function: struct_read' on BERNARD3.STO (Bernard's Copper Coronet store). Without fix, store doesn't get the 4th-level Animate Dead scroll. Users: change 'LAUNCH_PATCH_FUNCTION struct_read RET_ARRAY m = struct END' to 'LPF struct_read RET_ARRAY m=struct END' in mih_sp/animate_dead/animate_dead_scrolls.tpa.
